history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. The goal O is located two cells ahead and two cells to the right. I need to turn to face a safe direction. Turning clockwise will make me face right (east), where the adjacent cell is a floor tile (.). This will allow me to move toward the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (0,0) facing east. The goal is at (2,2) to the northeast. The cell directly in front (east) is a floor cell (.). Moving forward will bring me to (1,0), which is a safe step toward the goal. From there, I can navigate further north and east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (6,3) facing east. The goal is at (5,1) (visible to the northwest). The cell directly ahead is a wall (#). The safe path to the goal is to move west: first to (6,2), then to (6,1), then north to (5,1). To face west, I need to turn counter-clockwise twice. I will make the first turn now to face north, then next turn I will turn again to face west.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front of me (north) is a floor cell (.). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal. The goal is located at (4,4) relative to my current view. I can see a safe path ahead: move north twice, then east once to the goal. So I will move forward now.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am facing north. The cell directly in front of me is a floor cell (.), which is safe. The goal O is located one cell to my northeast. I will move forward to get closer to it, then turn east.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
After moving forward, I am now at a position where the cell directly ahead (north) is a wall. The goal O is immediately to my east (right). I need to turn clockwise to face east, then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The agent is now facing east after the clockwise turn. In the current egocentric view, the goal O is directly north (ahead) of the agent, which corresponds to the eastern direction in the world. The cell is safe, so moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
